use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF COUGH AND SYMPTOMS ASSOCIATED WITH UPPER RESPIRATORY ALLERGIES OR A COMMON COLD WITH CODEINE PHOSPHATE AND CHLORPHENIRAMINE MALEATE ORALLY ADMINISTERED EXTENDED RELEASE TABLETS

indications.text:
TUXARIN ER is indicated for the temporary relief of cough and upper respiratory symptoms associated with
allergy or the common cold in patients 18 years of age and older.
Important Limitations of Use
• Not indicated for pediatric patients under 18 years of age [see Use in Specific Population (8.4)]....
